steps.t: According to the Rangers, the spider-infested forest of Taurlingol can be found in eastern Cirith Ungol. You should find Taurlingol.
As you entered Taurlingol, you heard someone shouting. You should find the source of the shouting.
You have found Atli Spider-bane in combat with a giant spider of Taurlingol. You should help Atli defeat the spider!
Atli has moved to a safe location nearby. You should find and talk to Atli Spider-bane.
Legolas is tending to Atli Spider-bane's injuries on an overlook near Taurlingol. You should talk to Legolas.
You should inform Legolas of your success defeating the Mirkwood Spiders. Legolas can be found on a hill near Taurlingol.
